zh.Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭艾可利可林
zh.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾利可特
zh.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne是Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex的兒子，於1085年之前出生在英國英格蘭素瑞。他和Blanche de Tingry至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1129年8月在英國英格蘭奧可福爾利可特，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾利可特。

zh-hans.Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰艾可利可林
zh-hans.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾利可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne是Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex的儿子，于1085年之前出生在英国英格兰素瑞。他和Blanche de Tingry至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1129年8月在英国英格兰奧可福爾利可特，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾利可特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne was born before 1085, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom as the son of Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Blanche de Tingry. He died in August 1129, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne est né avant 1085, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Blanche de Tingry. Il est décédé en août 1129, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne wurde vor 1085 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex geboren. Er hatte mit Blanche de Tingry mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im August 1129 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne è nato il prima del 1085 nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Blanche de Tingry. Morì nel agosto 1129, nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスエセックスリックリング
ja.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコト
ja.Tonbridge, Kent, England: イギリスケントトンブリッジ
ja.lifeSummary: William de Boulogneは1085年以前にイギリスイギリススリーでLady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essexの息子として生まれた。彼はBlanche de Tingryとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1129年8月にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne(은)는 1085년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Blanche de Tingry(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 리컷에 묻혔다.

mn.Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom: Rickling, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Rycote, Oxfordshire, England: Rycote, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne nasceu antes 1085, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Blanche de Tingry. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1129, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne родился перед 1085 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Его мать звали Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Blanche de Tingry. Он умер август 1129 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: William de Boulogne nació antes de 1085, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Blanche de Tingry. Murió en agosto de 1129, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
